entry.title: New: BFED-20(27) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
DISCUSSION ON BILL 29 (2026), AMENDING FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET: DEPARTMENT OF MANAGEMENT, OFFICE OF RECOVERY PROGRAM, CONDITIONAL LANGUAGE FOR NATIVE HAWAIIAN EDUCATION ASSOCIATION AND IMUA FAMILY SERVICES (BFED-20(27))

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
